title: pavonia kunthii var. cordifolia
intro: Pavonia kunthii var. cordifolia, also known as the Heartleaf Pavonia, is a variety of the Pavonia kunthii plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as being used to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparation of Pavonia kunthii var. cordifolia is typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically as a cream or ointment to treat various health conditions.
